notes: Uncountable noun; no plural form. Can also be used as a verb (vertrauen + dativ).

sentences.german: Das Vertrauen zwischen den beiden Freunden ist sehr stark.
sentences.english: The trust between the two friends is very strong.

sentences.german: Sie hat das Vertrauen ihrer Kollegen verloren.
sentences.english: She has lost the trust of her colleagues.

sentences.german: Es braucht Zeit, um Vertrauen aufzubauen.
sentences.english: It takes time to build trust.
